brief: Today's news highlights tensions over AI and data centers, Iran-Hormuz clashes, and a Supreme Court security hearing, while papers explore multimodal emotion detection and AI research tools.
news_summary: PM vows to protect Australian content from AI; Supreme Court justices testify on security; U.S. advances permanent daylight saving time; boat sinks near Alcatraz; Iran tensions escalate.
papers_summary: Papers introduce CD-MED for cross-domain emotion analysis, GraphPolaris for graph database queries, and Aïra for interdisciplinary AI research assistance.

en.brief: Today's news highlights tensions over AI and data centers, Iran-Hormuz clashes, and a Supreme Court security hearing, while papers explore multimodal emotion detection and AI research tools.
en.news_summary: PM vows to protect Australian content from AI; Supreme Court justices testify on security; U.S. advances permanent daylight saving time; boat sinks near Alcatraz; Iran tensions escalate.
en.papers_summary: Papers introduce CD-MED for cross-domain emotion analysis, GraphPolaris for graph database queries, and Aïra for interdisciplinary AI research assistance.

zh.brief: 今日新闻涵盖香港独立书店记忆、霸王龙化石拍卖纪录、小红书上市疑云等话题，同时学界关注多模态情感描述与AI研究助手等进展。
zh.news_summary: 霸王龙化石创拍卖纪录，小红书前员工实名举报引发上市担忧；南海仲裁案十年争议未解，马兴瑞被“双开”成为关注焦点。
zh.papers_summary: 英文论文聚焦跨领域多模态情感描述（CD-MED）、图数据库可视化系统（GraphPolaris）以及面向跨学科科学的AI研究助手（Aïra）等前沿研究。

todays_image.caption: Just as sailors navigate uncharted waters, the PM steers Australia's cultural heritage away from being commandeered by AI's vast, power-hungry datacentres.
todays_image.title: Sailors
